parent_total_from_leaves_value: For parent category "{parent_label}", sum all outer leaf values under it. What is the total?
Under parent category "{parent_label}", add every printed outer leaf value. What total do they make?
Use the outer leaves belonging to parent category "{parent_label}". What is their combined value?
What is the sum of the printed outer leaf values under parent category "{parent_label}"?
For "{parent_label}", compute the total from all of its outer leaf values.
highest_parent_total_label: Using the printed outer leaf values, which parent category has the highest total?
Sum the outer leaf values for each parent category. Which parent category has the largest total?
Compare parent-category totals from their outer leaf values. Which parent category is highest?
Which parent category has the greatest sum of printed outer leaf values?
After adding the outer leaf values within each parent category, which parent category is largest?
lowest_parent_total_label: Using the printed outer leaf values, which parent category has the lowest total?
Sum the outer leaf values for each parent category. Which parent category has the smallest total?
Compare parent-category totals from their outer leaf values. Which parent category is lowest?
Which parent category has the least sum of printed outer leaf values?
After adding the outer leaf values within each parent category, which parent category is smallest?
above_threshold_leaf_count_under_parent: Under parent category "{parent_label}", how many outer leaves have values above {threshold_value}?
Count the outer leaves under "{parent_label}" whose printed values are above {threshold_value}.
For parent category "{parent_label}", how many printed outer leaf values are above {threshold_value}?
Within "{parent_label}", count the outer leaf values that are above {threshold_value}.
How many outer leaves belonging to "{parent_label}" have printed values above {threshold_value}?
below_threshold_leaf_count_under_parent: Under parent category "{parent_label}", how many outer leaves have values below {threshold_value}?
Count the outer leaves under "{parent_label}" whose printed values are below {threshold_value}.
For parent category "{parent_label}", how many printed outer leaf values are below {threshold_value}?
Within "{parent_label}", count the outer leaf values that are below {threshold_value}.
How many outer leaves belonging to "{parent_label}" have printed values below {threshold_value}?
leaf_range_count_under_parent: Under parent category "{parent_label}", how many outer leaves have values from {lower_value} through {upper_value}, inclusive?
Count the outer leaves under "{parent_label}" whose printed values are between {lower_value} and {upper_value}, inclusive.
For parent category "{parent_label}", how many printed outer leaf values fall in the inclusive range {lower_value} to {upper_value}?
Within "{parent_label}", count the outer leaf values from {lower_value} through {upper_value}.
How many outer leaves belonging to "{parent_label}" have printed values in [{lower_value}, {upper_value}]?
